summary: A wand collection tracking app where users can catalog their wands with names, add friends, and view their friends' wand collections
architectural_notes: Wand collection data model with name and count tracking
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Elegant crossed wands icon with starlight sparkles on dark wood background (wand-logo.dim_256x256.png)
- Mystical wand collection hero banner with magical glow effects and dark atmospheric background (wand-hero.dim_1200x400.png)

existing_features.title: Create user authentication system using Internet Identity for buyers and sellers to securely log in
Implement item listing creation system where sellers can add Harry Potter and wizarding world items with title, description, price, condition, and category
Build marketplace browse and search interface displaying all available Harry Potter and wizarding items with filtering by category, price range, and condition
Create shopping cart system where buyers can add multiple items, view cart contents, adjust quantities, and proceed to checkout
Implement messaging system allowing buyers and sellers to communicate about listings, ask questions, and coordinate transactions

Design a magical, wizarding-themed visual style with enchanted aesthetics including mystical colors (deep purples, emerald greens, gold accents), parchment-inspired textures, and elegant typography that evokes the Harry Potter universe throughout the entire application
Display generated marketplace hero banner, wizarding shop icon, and category placeholder images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
Create a user profile page component that displays a seller's information including their name, email (if provided), seller status, and member since date
Display all active listings created by the profile owner on their profile page in a grid layout similar to the browse page
Add navigation links to seller profiles from item cards and item detail pages by making the seller name clickable
Create a React Query hook for fetching user profile data with their listings and integrate it into the profile page component
Add a 'View Profile' link or button in the Layout header navigation when user is authenticated that navigates to their own profile page

Replace the existing marketplace logo image (identified by XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/header[1]/div[1]/div[1]/a[1]/img[1] in the Layout header) with a new generated image depicting Harry Potter's lightning bolt scar
Create an AccountSettingsPage component where authenticated users can view and edit their profile information including name, email, seller status, and profile picture
Add a profile picture upload component to the AccountSettingsPage that allows users to select an image file, preview it before uploading, and submit it to update their profile picture
Display user profile pictures in the ProfilePage component, Layout header navigation when authenticated, and on item cards/detail pages next to seller names
Add an 'Account Settings' navigation link in the Layout header that routes to the AccountSettingsPage when a user is authenticated
Create React Query hooks for fetching the authenticated user's own profile data and for updating profile information including profile picture uploads
Update the ProfileSetupModal to include a profile picture upload option during initial account setup

Update the CreateListingForm component to support listing custom syrup products by ensuring the category dropdown includes a 'Syrups' or 'Potions & Syrups' option that sellers can select when creating their listing
Update the FilterPanel component to include the new syrup category in the category filter dropdown so buyers can filter specifically for syrup products
Create a MyWandsPage component displaying the authenticated user's wand collection with wand count, list of wands showing names, and buttons to add new wands, edit wand names, and delete wands
Create an AddWandForm component with a text input for wand name and submit button that calls the backend addWand function
Create a FriendsPage component displaying the user's friends list, pending friend requests, and a section to search and send friend requests to other users by their username or userId
Create a FriendWandsPage component that displays a friend's wand collection including their wand count and list of wand names, accessible by clicking on a friend from the FriendsPage
Update Layout component navigation to include links to My Wands and Friends pages, replacing or alongside existing marketplace navigation

Create React Query hooks for all wand-related operations (useMyWands, useAddWand, useUpdateWandName, useDeleteWand, useFriendWands) and friend-related operations (useFriends, usePendingRequests, useSendFriendRequest, useAcceptRequest, useRejectRequest)
Update App.tsx to include routes for MyWandsPage (/my-wands), FriendsPage (/friends), and FriendWandsPage (/friends/:userId/wands)

Design a magical wand-themed visual style with mystical aesthetics including deep woods colors (oak browns, ebony blacks, mahogany reds), starlight accents, and elegant serif typography that evokes a wand collector's aesthetic throughout the application

new_feature_requests.summary: User authentication system for wand collectors
Wand collection interface where users can add, name, and count their wands
Friend system allowing users to add friends and view each other's wand collections
Create a backend Wand type with fields for id (Text), name (Text), owner (Principal), and createdAt (Int) timestamp
Implement backend functions to create a new wand, retrieve all wands for a user, retrieve a specific wand by id, update a wand's name, and delete a wand
Create a backend Friendship type and implement friend request system with functions to send friend requests, accept requests, reject requests, get pending requests, and get confirmed friends list
Implement backend function to retrieve wands belonging to a friend, returning wands only if a confirmed friendship exists between the caller and the wand owner
